releases.title: First public OTA release
releases.summary: Delta from 0.1.0-dev baseline: publishes the first production-intended OTA release with pinned trust, SHA-256 verification, and improved update progress feedback.

releases.title: Initial development baseline
releases.summary: Captures the first full SnowLeopard baseline: provisioning, relay control, settings, history, OLED status, alarms, and the first GitHub-hosted OTA metadata flow.
